home.title: LobHub Icons
home.subtitle: Beautiful, comprehensive icon library for Angular applications
home.description: LobHub Icons is a beautiful and easy-to-use Angular icon library with full TypeScript support. It provides icon components for your Angular application with a wide range of stunning icons.

icons.title: Comprehensive Icons
icons.desc: Access to a large collection of high-quality SVG icons from LobHub Icons

tree.title: Tree Shakeable
tree.desc: Only import the icons you need, reducing bundle size

custom.title: Customizable
custom.desc: Easy to customize size, color, and other styling properties

installation.title: Installation
installation.desc: Install the package via npm or yarn

usage.title: Basic Usage
usage.desc: Use the icon component in your templates

standalone.title: Standalone Component Example
standalone.desc: Example of using LobHub Icons in a standalone component
